DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF SUSAN JONES' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES IS MOOT AS RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO THE SUFFICIENCY OF SAID RESPONSES. THE COURT NOTES THAT THE PRELIMINARY STATEMENT IS NOT AUTHORIZED BY THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE AND SHOULD BE STRICKEN. IN ADDITION, AS THE RESPONSES WERE UNTIMELY THE OBJECTIONS WERE WAIVED AND SHOULD BE STRICKEN. THE MOTION FOR AN ORDER TO DEEM CERTAIN MATTERS ADMITTED IS DENIED. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $790 SHALL BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER.

SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, NOTICE OF CHANGE OF HANDLING ATTORNEY: ANDERSON, STEPHEN K. SUBSTITUTED FOR RUTHERFORD, LUANNE AS ATTORNEY FOR SAN FRANCISCO ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY INC. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Discovery And Monetray Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Susan Jones' motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is moot as responses have been served. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to the sufficiency of said responses. The Court notes that the preliminary statement is not authorized by the Code of Civil Procedure and should be stricken. In addition, as the responses were untimely the objections were waived and should be stricken.

The motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted is denied.

The Court finds that defendant failed to respond in a timely fashion thereby requiring the filing of the instant motion. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $790 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Set For Trial On Jul-06-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jun-22-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 608
